_comment: All knobs for one backtest run. Pessimistic by design — see README.

polygon._note: Set POLYGON_API_KEY as an environment variable (do NOT paste the key here / into git). Needs an Options tier that includes QUOTES (NBBO). No historical greeks on Polygon, so use contract_selection='nearest_atm'.

thetadata._note: Theta Terminal v3 on port 25503 (/v3 REST). Must be running + logged in. On a STANDARD options / FREE stock tier the engine reconstructs the intraday underlying from option quotes via put-call parity (no stock feed).

local._note: Files must match the normalized schema in src/schema.py.

strategy.name: orb_breakout_calls
strategy._delta_note: target_delta only used when contract_selection='target_delta' (needs a feed WITH historical greeks, e.g. ThetaData). Polygon has none -> use nearest_atm.
